name: Shrimp Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Cook the bacon until crispy.
3. Make a dark roux by combining bacon drippings and flour in a skillet over medium heat, stirring constantly until it's well-cooked and has a deep brown color.
4. Add the shrimp to the roux and stir together for several minutes.
5. Set aside the shrimp mixture.
6. In a separate pan, sauté chopped peppers and onions in corn oil until softened.
7. Add sliced okra and cook until almost tender.
8. Stir in the canned tomatoes and blend well with the okra mixture.
9. Add the roux and shrimp mixture to the okra pan.
10. Mix in water, bay leaf, garlic (crushed), salt, and cayenne or tabasco to taste.
11. Cover and gently simmer for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
12. Let stand until ready to serve.
13. Reheat slowly before serving over rice. Oysters or crabmeat, if desired, may be added during the final 15 minutes of cooking.
